description_long: This sculpture depicts a life-sized human figure standing upright on a rectangular pedestal, dressed in a long overcoat and holding an object in one hand. The figure's posture is formal, with the head slightly bowed and the feet together, suggesting a contemplative or respectful stance. The sculpture is rendered in a monochromatic gray material, likely stone or metal, and stands on a square base of cobblestone pavement. The surface of the figure and pedestal appears matte and slightly rough, with visible textural details in the clothing folds and facial features. The surrounding cobblestone platform is patterned with curved lines, enhancing the sense of placement in a public or ceremonial space. No visible signage or plaque is present near the sculpture.
description: A life-sized human figure in a long coat stands on a rectangular pedestal atop a patterned cobblestone platform, rendered in gray stone or metal. The sculpture exudes a formal, contemplative presence.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the back of the figure's overcoat and the full rectangular pedestal, with the cobblestone platform extending outward.
description_view_1: Left side profile highlighting the figure's arm holding an object and the drape of the coat, with the pedestal's side visible.
description_view_2: Frontal view displaying the figure's face, bowed head, and the object held in the right hand, with the pedestal and patterned cobblestone clearly visible.
description_view_3: Right side profile showing the opposite arm and the straight fall of the coat, with the pedestal's side and cobblestone platform in view.
attribute_location_context: The sculpture is installed outdoors on a patterned cobblestone platform, suggesting a public urban or plaza setting.
